# Pandozab (pandovirumab)

> Pandozab (pandovirumab) is a once-daily prescription tablet indicated for the treatment of hypertension (high blood pressure) in adults aged 18 and above.

## About This Site

This website provides information about Pandozab (pandovirumab), a prescription antihypertensive medication. It is intended for patients, caregivers, and healthcare professionals.

## What is Pandozab?

Pandozab (pandovirumab) is a prescription medication used to treat hypertension (high blood pressure) in adults. It belongs to a new class of antihypertensive agents that work by targeting key pathways involved in blood pressure regulation.

- Generic name: pandovirumab
- Brand name: Pandozab
- Drug class: Antihypertensive
- Administration route: Oral tablet
- Dosing frequency: Once daily
- Indicated for: Hypertension in adults aged 18 and above
- Prescription status: Prescription only

## Key Clinical Facts

- Clinically proven to reduce both systolic and diastolic blood pressure
- Phase III clinical trial with 2,400+ patients
- 87% of patients achieved target blood pressure
- 24 weeks of sustained blood pressure control demonstrated

## Important Disclaimer

This website is intended for informational purposes only. Pandozab is a fictional medication created for demonstration purposes. Always consult your healthcare provider before starting any medication.
